definitions.name: The Tent After the Festival
definitions.summary: A jewel-bright pavilion is larger than the district outside and remembers guests who have not arrived.

features.name: dance of absent feet
features.description: Footprints circle the floor and make room for the player.

features.name: tomorrow mask rack
features.description: Each mask resembles whoever will wear it next, badly frightened.

features.name: inside-out flower chandelier
features.description: Roots drink ceiling rain while blossoms illuminate the soil below.
